finding_results.notes: Council exchange now includes interruption beats (Bae cutting in; Kwon cutting off Ina) and clearer idiolect separation: Song hedges with model qualifiers, Bae frames panic-forward operations, Kwon repeats inevitability framing, and Ina uses corrective, contraction-forward rebuttal bursts under pressure.
Cited Ina/Minjae beats are contraction-forward and colloquial under pressure ("I'll call you...", "This isn't...") without role-inappropriate formality.

summary: Revised Chapter 11 to reduce transcript cadence in the council scene and sharpen speaker-specific dialogue signatures under pressure, while enforcing high-contraction naturalism for Ina and Minjae in packet-cited lines and preserving continuity and state-delta constraints.
